assumptions.name: Deterministic state transition function
assumptions.description: Given identical pre-state and transaction input, transition execution is deterministic.

assumptions.name: Canonical transaction sorting rule
assumptions.description: Nodes use the same tie-break and ordering policy for equivalent mempool snapshots.

assumptions.name: Partial synchrony network bound
assumptions.description: Message delay eventually falls below a known bound in steady-state conditions.

assumptions.name: Nominal load envelope
assumptions.description: Ingress load and hardware capacity remain within measured benchmark envelopes.

assumptions.name: Compaction fairness invariant
assumptions.description: Compaction policy does not starve eligible transactions over compaction windows.
